examples: Both China and many other countries around the world have large saline-alkali land.
In 2017, Yuan's team successfully grew rice on the saline-alkali land in Jiangsu Province.
They would turn 100 million mu of saline-alkali land into farmland in the country over the next 10 years.
Nearby, Huntsman works with Shanghai Chloro-Alkali Chemical to turn the crude MDI into a finished prepolymer.
The main electrolytes used today are alkali, molten carbonate, phosphoric acid, proton exchange membrane and solid oxide.
